requirements.task_name: Request the earliest weekday speech evaluation after 3 PM at the Main Clinic for a 5-year-old
requirements.task_description: Submit a booking request for an initial speech evaluation for a 5-year-old at the Main Clinic, choosing the first available weekday appointment between May 10 and May 20 at or after 3:00 PM.
existing_variables: appointment_requests
// to find the submitted request (service_id, appointment_slot_id, child_age_years, location_id)
appointment_slots
// to verify slot date/time, appointment_kind, is_weekday, and that it is the earliest qualifying slot
clinic_locations
// to confirm the chosen location is the Main Clinic - Downtown (by name matching /main|downtown/i)
services
// to confirm the service is Speech Therapy and that the slot is an initial evaluation session for that service

requirements.task_name: Choose the autism therapist for teens with more experience and request an appointment
requirements.task_description: Filter the therapist directory for autism + teens, sort by experience (most to least), compare the first two therapists, favorite the more experienced one, and request an appointment for that therapist.
existing_variables: therapists
// to know specialties, age_groups_served, and years_of_experience
favorite_therapists
// to confirm which therapist was added to favorites
appointment_requests
// to confirm an appointment request was submitted for the same therapist (request_type 'therapist_preference')

required_variables.set_condition: On every call to searchTherapists, after filters have been applied and results sorted (just before the function returns).
required_variables.value_to_set:
An object capturing the most recent therapist search parameters, for example:
{
  specialty: specialty || null,
  ageGroup: ageGroup || null,
  locationId: locationId || null,
  language: language || null,
  insurancePlanId: insurancePlanId || null,
  sortBy: sortBy || 'experience_desc',
  page: page || 1,
  pageSize: pageSize || 20,
  timestamp: this._nowIso()
}
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to confirm that the directory was actually searched with the correct criteria for this task: specialty 'Autism', ageGroup 'teens_13_17' (or equivalent teens code), and sortBy 'experience_desc'. Using this stored context, the evaluator can re-run the same filter/sort logic against the therapists data to reconstruct the ordered list and identify the first two therapists that should have been compared.

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getTherapistProfile(therapistId) returns a valid therapist (t != null).
required_variables.reason: Tracks which therapist profiles were actually opened (viewed) so the evaluator can verify that the user compared the correct therapists. Combined with task2_searchContext (to reconstruct the sorted list), the evaluator can check that the two viewed IDs correspond to the first two search results and that the therapist ultimately favorited and used in the appointment request is the more experienced of those two.

requirements.task_name: Save three sensory processing articles for ages 3–5 that take at least 5 minutes to read
requirements.task_description: Find and save three sensory processing articles for ages 3–5 with a reading time of at least 5 minutes each, then open the saved reading list page.
existing_variables: saved_resources
// to know which resource IDs were saved/added to the reading list
resource_items
// to check each saved resource's age_groups, content_type ('article'), reading_time_minutes >= 5, and topic/title for 'sensory processing'

required_variables.set_condition: Every time getSavedReadingList() is called (i.e., when the Saved Resources / My Reading List page is opened).
required_variables.reason: Provides a simple, non-invasive marker that the user actually opened the saved reading list page after saving the articles. The evaluator will combine this flag with saved_resources + resource_items to confirm that (1) at least three qualifying sensory-processing articles for ages 3–5 and ≥5 minutes were saved, and (2) the reading list page was viewed.

requirements.task_name: Register for a social skills group next month for ages 8–10 costing under $50
requirements.task_description: Find a social skills group for ages 8–10 next month under $50 and submit the registration for the earliest starting qualifying group.
existing_variables: group_registrations
// to find the submitted registration and link to a specific group_program and session option
group_programs
// to verify title/description (social skills), age_groups, price_per_child, start_date, and is_active
group_session_options
// to confirm a valid session option (e.g., 'Tuesdays 4:00 PM') was selected

requirements.task_name: Estimate monthly cost for 4 speech and 2 OT sessions with an in-network plan and request a detailed quote
requirements.task_description: Use the cost estimator to calculate a monthly fee for 4 speech and 2 OT sessions on an in-network plan, then send a contact request tied to that estimate with the same quantities in the message.
existing_variables: cost_estimates
// to inspect total_monthly_cost and insurance_plan_id for the estimate
cost_estimate_items
// to confirm service_id mappings and sessions_per_month (4 speech, 2 OT)
insurance_plans
// to verify the selected plan is marked network_status === 'in_network'
services
// to map service_ids to 'Speech Therapy' and 'Occupational Therapy'
cost_estimate_contact_requests
// to ensure a contact request was submitted for that cost_estimate_id and to inspect the message content

requirements.task_name: Find the nearest clinic within 15 miles of ZIP 94110 with free parking and Saturday hours and request a call
requirements.task_description: Use the locations finder to search near ZIP 94110, filter for clinics within 15 miles with free parking and Saturday hours, choose the nearest result, and submit a callback request.
existing_variables: callback_requests
// to find the submitted callback (location_id, phone_number, preferred_call_time, message)
clinic_locations
// to verify has_free_parking / amenities, open_saturday, postal_code, and to recompute relative distance from ZIP 94110

requirements.task_name: Create and save a weekly therapy plan with 3 specific sessions for one child
requirements.task_description: Use the scheduling tool to build and save a weekly plan for one child with three specific sessions (Speech Tue 4:00/60, OT Thu 5:30/60, Counseling Sat 11:00/45) named 'Alex Spring Schedule'.
existing_variables: weekly_plans
// to identify the saved plan by name ('Alex Spring Schedule') and child_name ('Alex')
weekly_plan_sessions
// to inspect the three sessions (service_id, day_of_week, start_time, duration_minutes) linked to that weekly_plan_id
services
// to map service_id values to 'Speech Therapy', 'Occupational Therapy', and 'Counseling'

requirements.task_name: Submit a one-time $75 pledge to the Therapy Scholarship Fund in honor of a family
requirements.task_description: On the donation page, submit a one-time $75 pledge to the Therapy Scholarship Fund with an 'in honor of' dedication and contact details.
existing_variables: donation_pledges
// to verify amount, gift_type, dedication_type, honoree_name, donor info, preferred_contact_method
donation_funds
// to confirm that the selected fund_id corresponds to the 'Therapy Scholarship Fund'
